title: Tiger stepping away from golf to seek treatment
content: In a statement four days after his arrest in Florida, Tiger Woods said Tuesday he's "committed to taking the time needed to return to a healthier, stronger, and more focused place, both personally and professionally."

title: Portugal outclasses U.S. amid Pulisic goal drought
content: The United States dropped its second match in a row Tuesday, losing to Portugal in a friendly at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta to conclude its March international window.

title: Goodell backs Rooney Rule amid litigation threat
content: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell said he believes the Rooney Rule is "consistent" with hiring laws after recently being threatened by Florida's attorney general with potential civil litigation if the rule was not eliminated.

title: Italy miss out on 3rd straight WC in shootout loss
content: Italy has missed out on a third-consecutive World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina in a penalty shootout on Tuesday in Zenica.

title: NFL owners OK two significant replay changes
content: NFL owners approved a contingency plan Tuesday to centralize officiating in the event of a work stoppage as negotiations continue on a CBA with the NFL Referees Association.

title: Ovechkin extends record with 20th 30-goal season
content: Alex Ovechkin scored twice and hit the 30-goal mark for the record-extending 20th time in his NHL career, and the Washington Capitals beat the Philadelphia Flyers 6-4 on Tuesday night.

title: Hurley: I thought ref was looking to 'chest-bump'
content: UConn coach Dan Hurley downplayed his bizarre interaction with an official at the end of Sunday's NCAA tournament victory against Duke, saying he thought the referee was looking to "chest-bump me to celebrate."

title: With lockout possible, MLBPA war chest at $415M
content: MLB players have accumulated $415 million in U.S. Treasury securities, cash and other investments as they prepare for the possibility of an extended lockout when the CBA expires on Dec. 1.

title: 📉 2026 Pain Index: Where does Duke's loss rank?
content: Some losses are understandable in the NCAA tournament. Others will haunt us forever (see: Duke). We rank them all.

title: What we heard at the 2026 annual league meeting: Last-minute buzz from more than 25 NFL teams
content: Annual NFL owners meeting wrapped up Tuesday, and 30 of our reporters shared all the buzz from Phoenix.

title: 18-game regular season? Mixed reaction by NFL owners, coaches
content: Colts, Chiefs, Browns and Patriots owners among those talking about feasibility of expanding schedule.

title: Should the USMNT be concerned about Pulisic's goal drought?
content: Roberto Martinez might think it's "worthless" to read into any results ahead of the World Cup, but alarm bells must surely be ringing in the USMNT camp over Christian Pulisic's 14-match goal drought.

title: Six free agency options for LeBron, according to NBA coaches, execs and scouts
content: Lakers? Cavs? Warriors? A wild card? Before LeBron James makes his decision this summer, sources around the league weigh in.

title: Best team fits for 20 draft prospects: We found matches for Mansoor Delane, Caleb Downs, Denzel Boston
content: We took 20 NFL draft prospects who could get picked in Rounds 1 and 2 and found ideal scheme matches based on what each player does best.

title: A wagon... or a freight train? How the Sabres became the newest Stanley Cup contender
content: Buffalo isn't just ending a playoff drought; it's smashing the gate open. Here's how the Sabres have done it, and how dangerous they'll be this spring.

title: NHL playoff watch: Hurricanes, Blue Jackets battle to bolster playoff seeds
content: Both clubs need the two points on the line in Tuesday's matchup. Plus, full playoff projections and more.

title: Ready to win big -- or be a big-time disappointment? The 5 most polarizing MLB teams
content: Is your team a threat to win big -- or a disappointment waiting to happen? It depends on who is asked.

title: 'You can tell they believe they belong': The six rookies off to the hottest starts of 2026
content: From Chase DeLauter to JJ Wetherholt, these young players are making an immediate impact for their teams.

title: Türkiye will be USMNT's stiffest test in World Cup group stage
content: Türkiye could be one of the World Cup's most dangerous outsiders. Are they now Group D favorites over the U.S.? Here's what to know about the team.

title: Process over perfection: How UConn prepared to chase its third title in four years
content: The pressure of expectation derailed the Huskies' bid for a three-peat. Perspective has them back in contention.

title: Women's March Madness 2026: Ranking the Final Four
content: No. 1 seeds UConn, UCLA, Texas and South Carolina head to the Final Four for the second consecutive year.

title: The Final Four is set! Breaking down Texas' and South Carolina's wins
content: After Texas' and South Carolina's wins, the Final Four is set! Here's everything you need to know from Monday.

title: Dybantsa, Boozer, Acuff headline men's Wooden finalists and All-America selections
content: Michigan's Yaxel Lendeborg and Purdue's Braden Smith join the trio of freshmen to make the cut for both.

title: UConn's Strong, Fudd headline women's Wooden Award finalists
content: Four players who will be on the court at the women's Final Four in Phoenix are among the five Wooden Award finalists.

title: MLB awards: Judge and Ohtani once again favored to win MVP honors
content: Who are the favorites to win seasonlong honors? Here are the odds for MVP, Cy Young and Rookie of the Year in the AL and NL.

title: Closer stock watch: Don't run from Carlos Estevez just yet
content: Everything fantasy baseball managers need to know about which closers should be added, dropped and more.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 'That's like Miami Bron': LeBron James confirms breaking driveway backboard vs. Bronny
content: LeBron James wasn't letting a younger Bronny James have a shot at a win, and he broke a backboard in the process.

title: Pickups: Harper, Sexton, Hayes among top players to add
content: Advancing in the fantasy basketball playoffs means finding available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Moses Itauma crashes into heavyweight top 5
content: Moses Itauma disposed of Jermaine Franklin Jr. to move up at heavyweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Will Casemiro end up playing with Ronaldo or Messi?
content: Cristiano Ronaldo is trying to tempt Casemiro to join him at Al Nassr, while Real Madrid have Enzo Fernández on their radar. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Players to watch at the 2026 ANWA: Asterisk Talley, Kiara Romero among top contenders
content: The Augusta National Women's Amateur gets things started this week ahead of the Masters. Who are some players to watch?

title: Jet fuel prices more than double; brace for steep airfare hikes
content: Indian airlines face a significant surge in airfares as jet fuel prices have more than doubled for April, driven by the Iran war. This drastic increase, coupled with a weakening rupee, is expected to lead to fare hikes and potential flight reductions as airlines grapple with soaring operating costs.

title: 'Bengaluru techie lost US job due to AI': How interfaith couple’s final moments unfolded
content: A Bengaluru IT engineer was found dead in his apartment, prompting his wife to die by suicide shortly after by jumping from the 18th floor of the same complex. Preliminary findings suggest the husband was facing significant stressors, including health issues and anxiety over unemployment after losing his job in the US.

title: 'Takes Muslim votes, builds temples': Expelled TMC leader Humayun Kabir targets Mamata
content: Aam Janata Unnayan Party chief Humayun Kabir accused West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee of neglecting Muslim voters while favouring Hindus with temple construction. Kabir, now allied with AIMIM's Asaduddin Owaisi, vowed to unseat Banerjee, promising better financial aid to women and emphasizing the need for independent Muslim political leadership for development.

title: 'I don't fear criticism': Arjun Tendulkar's no-nonsense reply goes viral
content: Arjun Tendulkar, son of Sachin Tendulkar, will play for Lucknow Super Giants in IPL 2026 after being picked at his base price.  He revealed his calm demeanor stems from playing with his five dogs in Goa.  Tendulkar previously played two seasons with Mumbai Indians, taking three wickets and scoring 13 runs in five matches.

title: $340 bn Anthropic that wiped trillions from stock market has source code of its tool leaked
content: AI firm Anthropic suffered a significant source code leak of its Claude Code agent, exposing unreleased features like an always-on AI and a pet system. This marks the third such incident for the company, which is reportedly preparing for a massive $380 billion IPO. The leak offers a rare glimpse into the company's development practices.

title: Shreyas Iyer's sister's bhangra sets internet on fire after Punjab Kings win - watch
content: Punjab Kings secured a thrilling three-wicket victory over Gujarat Titans, thanks to an unbeaten 72 from Cooper Connolly.  While Connolly's stellar performance clinched the win, captain Shreyas Iyer's sister, Shresta, stole the spotlight with a viral bhangra celebration post-match. Iyer also provided an update on his wrist injury.

title: Oracle layoffs: Employees in India, US, & other regions receive email at 6am
content: Oracle has initiated widespread global layoffs, impacting employees in the US, India, and other regions without prior notice.  Termination emails, sent directly from leadership, cited organizational changes as the reason, with affected teams seeing significant reductions.  This move is reportedly to fund Oracle's ambitious, debt-financed AI infrastructure expansion, potentially impacting thousands of jobs.

title: Price of commercial LPG cylinders hiked by Rs 195.50 in Delhi
content: The increase in price comes despite the Delhi government increasing the allocation of commercial LPG cylinders to 50% of the average daily consumption, raising supplies from 1,800 to 4,500 cylinders (19 kg equivalent) per day in line with directives from the Centre. In Delhi, the price has increased by Rs 195.50, while in Kolkata, the hike stands at Rs 218.

title: Amazon is taking its 'big fight' with Elon Musk's SpaceX to skies with this partnership
content: Amazon's Leo satellite network will provide in-flight Wi-Fi for Delta Airlines, starting with 500 aircraft in 2028. This partnership intensifies Amazon's competition with SpaceX's Starlink in the aviation market. The Leo-powered Wi-Fi will remain free for Delta SkyMiles members, offering speeds up to 1 Gbps download.

title: 'It's the same as ... ': Shreyas Iyer breaks silence on scary wrist injury
content: Punjab Kings captain Shreyas Iyer sustained a wrist injury during their IPL 2026 clash against Gujarat Titans but appeared in good spirits post-match. Debutant Cooper Connolly's maiden half-century guided Punjab to a three-wicket victory in their opening game.

title: India prepares for its biggest headcount: What makes Census 2027 different
content: India gears up for Census 2027, a comprehensive, paper-free digital headcount after a decade-long delay. This exercise will include caste enumeration for the first time since 1931 and will be crucial for Lok Sabha delimitation, potentially impacting women's reservation. The digital approach aims for efficiency and transparency.

title: Candidates chess: How a miracle rescued Divya Deshmukh and India from Round 3 disaster
content: R Praggnanandhaa suffered his first defeat at the Candidates after an uncharacteristic opening choice against Javokhir Sindarov. In the women's section, Divya Deshmukh secured a miraculous draw against Aleksandra Goryachkina following a late blunder. Fabiano Caruana and Sindarov lead the open section.

title: Planning to buy a property? Expert shares hidden costs one should keep in mind while investing
content: Buying a property involves significant hidden costs beyond the initial price. Buyers must account for stamp duty, registration fees, home loan expenses, ongoing maintenance, property taxes, utility deposits, interior furnishing, legal documentation, and miscellaneous charges. Understanding these expenses is crucial for informed financial planning and a smooth homeownership journey.

title: Are your kidneys getting damaged silently without any symptoms?
content: Kidney disease often strikes silently, with damage occurring before noticeable symptoms appear. Experts warn that excessive salt, junk food, and unprescribed painkillers can harm kidneys, especially for those with diabetes and hypertension. Early detection through routine check-ups and monitoring blood pressure and sugar are crucial for prevention and managing this silent threat.

title: 29 dead after Russian military plane crashes in Crimea
content: A Russian An-26 military transport aircraft crashed into a cliff in Crimea, killing all 29 people on board. Russia's defense ministry stated a technical malfunction is the likely cause, with no signs of external impact. A military commission is investigating the incident.

title: Ram Gopal Varma explains the difference between Ranveer's 'Dhurandhar' and Ranbir's 'Animal'
content: Ram Gopal Varma has opened up about the impact of Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar and its sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge starring Ranveer Singh, drawing a sharp comparison with Sandeep Reddy Vanga's Animal starring Ranbir Kapoor and explaining why the former has left a deeper impression on him.

title: Dallas Cowboys target $26 million Miami Dolphins LB in major NFL trade push
content: The Dallas Cowboys have intensified trade discussions with the Miami Dolphins as they look to fix a struggling defense. After strengthening other areas, linebacker remains a key concern. Team leaders have downplayed urgency publicly, but internal signals suggest otherwise. With roster pressure building, Dallas appears ready to explore bold moves to stay competitive and address its most obvious defensive weakness.

title: 'We'll be leaving very soon': Trump says US to end Iran war in 2-3 weeks
content: Speaking to reporters in the Oval Office, Trump said, "We'll be leaving very soon," adding that the withdrawal could happen "within two weeks, maybe two weeks, maybe three." The remarks are his clearest yet that Washington is preparing to wind down the month-long war. Trump also said a deal with Tehran is not necessary to bring the conflict to an end.

title: Netanyahu says building 'new alliances with important countries' in West Asia amid Iran war
content: In an address in Hebrew ahead of Pesach, Netanyahu said the Iranian regime would collapse “sooner or later” and that Israel is building “new alliances with important countries in the region” to counter Tehran. He did not name the countries but said he hopes that “soon, I will be able to tell you more about these vital alliances”.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi’s emotional post on family bond
content: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Drew ‘Druski’ Desbordes, Erika Kirk respond to skit?
content: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.

title: Justin Jefferson’s Vikings linked to $47 m Lions center move
content: The Minnesota Vikings are linked to Detroit Lions center Graham Glasgow in 2026 free agency following Ryan Kelly’s retirement. Glasgow is a veteran with extensive experience. He could fill the void left by Kelly. He could offer a proven presence despite his age. He may to have compete with current Vikings centers Blake Brandel and Michael Jurgens.

title: 'Dil Laga Liya' meets PSL: 90s-style edit for Adam Zampa leaves internet divided
content: The video stood out for its theme, drawing from the style of 1990s wedding videos. It featured the Bollywood song 'Dil laga liya maine tumse pyaar kar ke' from the film Dil Hai Tumhaara, starring Preity Zinta.

title: South African cricketer under investigation after walking out of final to catch UK flight
content: South African cricketer Beyers Swanepoel's Worcestershire stint is uncertain after he abandoned his domestic team mid-match for a flight. Cricket South Africa is investigating, and his No-Objection Certificate is unsigned. The Lions expressed deep disappointment, with potential contract termination looming over his unprofessional departure.

title: Cooper Connolly dream debut powers Punjab Kings to three wickets win over Gujarat Titans
content: Debutant Cooper Connolly starred with a match-winning unbeaten 72, guiding Punjab Kings to a thrilling three-wicket victory over Gujarat Titans. Chasing 163, Connolly's composed knock, supported by Prabhsimran Singh's aggressive start, ensured PBKS crossed the finish line with five balls to spare. Vijaykumar Vyshak's three wickets earlier restricted GT.

title: Assembly Election LIVE: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin to campaign in Coimbatore
content: The BJP released its manifesto for Assam, promising to work towards implementing UCC, protecting the land, heritage, and dignity of indigenous people, and pushing its development agenda

title: LPG and fuel crisis LIVE: Jet fuel prices more than doubled to ₹2.07 lakh/kl; commercial LPG up ₹195.50
content: This is the first time ever that aviation turbine fuel prices have crossed the ₹2 lakh per kilolitre mark; domestic cooking gas LPG rates, which were last hiked by ₹60 per 14.2 kg cylinder on March 7, remain unchanged

title: Jet fuel prices more than doubled to ₹2.07 lakh/kl, commercial LPG up ₹195.50
content: This is the first time ever that ATF prices have crossed the ₹2 lakh per kilolitre mark; domestic cooking gas LPG rates, which were last hiked by ₹60 per 14.2 kg cylinder on March 7, remain unchanged

title: T.N. Assembly election: BJP may try to split DMK alliance even if it gets a majority: Thol. Thirumavalavan
content: ‘I wanted to contest in the Assembly election since 2021. How we function in the Assembly shapes the public perception. Going to Parliament is an honour. But, when I look at Tamil Nadu politics, the BJP’s strategy of gradually weakening regional parties and establishing itself is a cause for concern’

title: West Asia conflict: Congress spreading panic for political gains like 'political vultures', says PM Modi
content: Mr. Modi accused Congress of indulging in rumour-mongering and trying to instigate people to queue up at fuel pumps and spread public disorder

title: Terrorist killed in ongoing Ganderbal operation in Kashmir: Army
content: The Army on Tuesday (March 31) said the joint search operation was launched in a jungle area of Ganderbal after receiving specific intelligence input

title: Filmmaker Ranjith held in sexual abuse case
content: Two cases of sexual assault were registered against Mr. Ranjith in 2024 following allegations against him in the wake of the release of the Justice Hema Committee report

title: Assembly Election updates: Two free LPG cylinders annually on Onam, Christmas among NDA's poll promises in Kerala
content: FM Nirmala Sitharaman released the BJP's manifesto for the Assam Assembly polls, promising protection of land, heritage and dignity of indigenous people and ₹5 lakh crore infrastructure investment.

title: ‘Regional imbalance’ bothers Congress as government plans delimitation to roll out women’s reservation
content: Congress leaders say if the strength of the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies is increased uniformly by 50%, States with larger populations would gain more seats, widening the existing representation gap

title: How Ulloor Krishi Bhavan in Thiruvananthapuram is handholding small scale farmers
content: Agricultural produce and value-added products are marketed under the brand name Ulloor Greens by Ulloor Krishi Bhavan. A retail outlet and online sale of products are already in place

title: Odisha’s Late Marriage Incentives fails to reach beneficiaries in PVTGs, says CAG
content: Despite very high incidences of child marriages, CAG finds micro project agencies did not have information regarding child marriages taking place in the villages under their control

title: Over 17,000 factories registered in nine years of Yogi rule, shows data
content: “Over the past nine years, the Yogi Government has established a new identity for Uttar Pradesh in the field of industrial development. As a result of good governance, transparent policies, and visionary leadership under Yogi Government, 17,841 new factories have been registered in the State from April 2017 until now,” reads an official statement.

title: J&K Speaker says ‘don’t take security scenario lightly’, as NC alleges withdrawal of party office security cover
content: “The concerns raised by legislators should be taken seriously by the concerned authorities. The security scenario cannot be taken lightly. Past incidents must guide present decisions. If the administration believes the situation is normal, declare J&K as a risk-free region,” says J&K Speaker Abdul Rahim Rather

title: Khela Hobe: game on as Trinamool fields sportspersons in north Bengal
content: The Trinamool has named Asian Games gold medallist Swapna Barman and former cricketer Shib Sankar Paul as candidates from Rajganj and Tufanganj respectively; both joined the party days before the candidates’ list was announced

title: Parties rework strategy amid increasing acrimony as Kerala race enters final leg
content: The electoral battle in Kerala is shaping up as a direct confrontation between the ruling CPI(M)-led LDF and an invigorated Congress-led UDF, with the BJP-led NDA struggling to muscle in as a third force in the sweepstakes

title: NIA, ED bust Maoist extortion, money laundering rackets
content: The NIA has an anti-Naxal vertical investigating over 100 cases and has filed chargesheets in almost 90 cases; the agency has seized assets worth more than ₹40 crore

title: Violence erupts outside Kolkata CEO office after Trinamool alleges bulk submissions of Form 6 by BJP
content: Mamata writes to CEC alleging that BJP is trying to smuggle outsiders into State voter list, in a bid at “voter hijacking”; CEO says it is not his job to check Form 6 submissions; CM threatened Central forces

title: Prayer meeting in private dwellings does not require prior nod: Chhattisgarh HC
content: Petitioners move court after police issued notices to them; court says authorities are free to act if they find any violation in the form of noise pollution or if any law and order situation arises

title: T.N. Assembly election: Long-pending demand of Chengalpattu residents for better infrastructure remain unfulfilled
content: With a sizeable farming community, residents of Chengalpattu constituency call for water management projects; they demand that the authorities clean Kolavai Lake and complete a sewer line work; since the district has no minister, residents are unable to take up local issues with those in power

title: KUWJ annual awards for 2024 announced
content: The awards will be presented at the 40th State Journalists’ Conference to be held in Bidar on April 11 and 12

title: SIR exercise: In Kodagu plantation belt, BLOs struggle to map workers from tribal communities
content: Largely from Adivasi communities, many neither remember their earlier place of enrolment nor possess documents to establish it

title: Census exercise begins in Karnataka today with opening of self-enumeration window
content: Karnataka is among the eight States/Union Territories where the census operation is being launched on Wednesday

title: T.N. Assembly poll an opportunity for voters to choose between Modi and Stalin: Udhayanidhi
content: He was addressing party cadre and residents in Tiruvannamalai to seek votes for incumbent Tiruvannamalai MLA and Minister for Highways E.V. Velu

title: Boycott NDA to protect Tamil Nadu’s rights, says Stalin
content: Accusing Edappadi K. Palaniswami of becoming a branch secretary of the BJP, he asserts that the NDA has to be uprooted completely to prevent Tamil Nadu from becoming a land of violence

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: full list of DMK candidates
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin and Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin will once again contest from Kolathur and Chepauk-Tiruvallikeni constituencies, respectively

title: Congress to protest against FCRA amendment Bill
content: “This is a blatantly unconstitutional law which will destroy NGOs and community organisations — especially those run by minority communities,” says Venugopal

title: Karnataka bypolls: Shamanur family continues its hold over Davangere
content: The family’s bonhomie with the minority community is one of the major contributing factors to the family’s successive victories

title: Trump Cares Deeply About US-India Relationship: US Ambassador
content: US Ambassador Sergio Gor says President Trump deeply cares about US-India ties after White House meeting

title: 'US Forces Ready': White House Replies To Iran's Strike Warning To Tech Firms
content: The statement came in response to Iran's Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) warning of targeting US technology firms if more Iranian leaders were killed in "targeted assassinations".

title: Musk Must Face Class Action Over Late Disclosure Of Twitter Stake: Court
content: The investors said Musk saved more than $200 million, and cheated them because they sold Twitter shares at depressed prices during the 11-day period.

title: Gold Loans Now 36% Of All Loans In India, Small Towns Drive Surge: Report
content: Earlier, gold loans were mostly popular in southern states. Now, there is strong growth in Uttar Pradesh, Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan.

title: Commercial LPG Prices Hiked By Rs 195.5, No Changes In Domestic Rates
content: Prices of commercial LPG were hiked by Rs 195.50 on Wednesday, on back of surge in global oil prices linked to the widening West Asia conflict.

title: Chhattisgarh's Sukma Declared Naxal-Free After 2 Naxalites Surrender: Cops
content: SP Chavan said the two women were members of Company Number 8 of the Naxalite organisation and had a combined bounty of Rs 16 lakhs on their heads.

title: "India-China Relations Moving In Correct Direction: Chinese Consul Qin Jie
content: Consul General of the People's Republic of China in Mumbai, Qin Jie, spoke about the future of India-China ties and expressed optimism as he recalled the meeting between PM Modi and President Xi Jinping.

title: 29 Killed As Russian Military Plane Crashes In Crimea
content: A Russian An-26 military transport plane crashed in Crimea, killing 29 people aboard, Russian news agencies quoted the Defence Ministry as saying early on Wednesday.

title: "Maybe Two Weeks": Trump Says US To Leave Iran "Very Soon"
content: Iran War: President Donald Trump said Tuesday that US forces would end operations in Iran "very soon," evoking a timeline of two to three weeks.

title: France Eyes Ban On Social Media For Under 15s
content: President Emmanuel Macron is hoping France will become one of the first European Union countries to ban social media for under-15s, following similar moves in Australia and Indonesia.

title: US Court Blocks Trump's $400 Million White House Ballroom Project
content: A US judge on Tuesday ordered a halt to construction of a massive ballroom launched by President Donald Trump after tearing down the historic East Wing of the White House.

title: Marco Rubio Urges Diplomats To Use X To Fight "Anti-American Propaganda"
content: US diplomats should use social media platform X and partner with military psychological operations units in an effort to "counter foreign anti-American propaganda," Secretary of State Marco Rubio said.

title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Continue To "Crush Iran's Terror Regime"
content: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Tuesday that Israel would press ahead with its military campaign against Tehran, declaring that it would continue to "crush Iran's terror regime".

title: LaGuardia Staff May Have Violated Procedures On Night Of Collision: Report
content: According to the LaGuardia standard operating procedures, the local and ground positions should not have been combined until midnight at the earliest.

title: Warren Buffett To Stop Donations To Gates Foundation Over Epstein Files
content: Buffett said he has not spoken with Gates since the US Department of Justice released documents in February, showing that Gates and Epstein met repeatedly.

title: India's Power Sector Targets Self-Reliance Amid Middle East War Oil Shocks
content: India's power sector is getting self-reliant with the rise in coal production and green energy diversification.

title: US Israel Iran War LIVE: Iran Guards Say Will Target US Tech Firms If More Leaders Killed
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: The United States and Israel continue to strike Iran, whose retaliatory attacks have targeted Israel and neighboring Gulf Arab states. More than 3,000 people have been killed.

title: Strikes To Begin Today: Iran Warns Tech Firms Over US' Killing Of Leaders
content: The Guards said that they would target leading US technology firms, listing the names of 18 companies it alleged were complicit in the "targeted assassination" of officials.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Actor-politicians and their crusade against corruption
content: Actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay’s anti-corruption plank is nothing new as the film stars floating their own parties in Tamil Nadu have taken up this theme to earn a name for themselves and garner a massive vote

title: CPI manifesto promises to fight commercialisation of drinking water, agriculture and irrigation
content: The CPI said it would ensure the development of micro, small and medium industries and prevent the commercialisation of drinking water, agriculture and irrigation

title: World Bank-funded health scheme in Kerala might need more scrutiny
content: The ₹3,464-crore World Bank- assisted  Kerala Health System Improvement Programme commits the State to a 25-year-loan with a five-year grace period. Public health experts have pointed out the red flags when a State, whose total debt has surged by 80% in the last five years, takes on a 25-year World Bank loan and the pressure of repayment

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Rahul Gandhi alleges BJP-Left nexus, unveils welfare ‘guarantees’

title: Sahaya app glitches, garbage woes highlighted at RWA meet in South Corporation
content: Bengaluru South City Corporation Commissioner K.N. Ramesh says ₹2.25 crore has been allocated for each ward in the upcoming budget, with an additional ₹75 lakh earmarked specifically for maintenance works.

title: Tamil Nadu Election 2026: full list of AIADMK candidates
content: All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam or the AIADMK, the party led by Edappadi K. Palaniswami, is contesting in 167 seats as part of the National Democratic Alliance (NDA) in Tamil Nadu during the upcoming Assembly election in the State.

title: Calcutta High Court dismisses PIL challenging transfers of W.B. govt officials by Election Commission
content: The poll panel has transferred several officers, including the State’s chief secretary, home secretary and Director General of Police (DGP), after announcing the schedule of the Assembly polls

title: Study warns of glacial outburst risk to buildings, bridges from 5 Kashmir lakes: Omar
content: five lakes in the Kashmir Valley have high susceptibility to glacial lake outburst floods . they pose a threat to 2,704 buildings, 15 major bridges, road stretches, and a hydropower plant . a lake classified as highly susceptible does not mean it is currently unstable .

title: TG bill becomes law; uncertainty over 32K self-identified TG certificates
content: amendments remove provisions in the 2019 law that allowed "self-perceived gender identity" to be the basis for self-determination and identification . a medical board headed by the chief medical officer has been introduced . the district magistrate will issue a certificate of transgender identity .

title: 86 per cent in India report workplace disruptions, above global levels
content: . Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More

title: Top newcomers for Notre Dame and every Big Ten team; what coaches, GMs are saying
content: coach Curt Cignetti says he ripped Michigan State transfer Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats to practice . no conference in 2025 better felt how quality newcomers can reshape rosters like the Big Ten .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: UConn odds-on title favorite, 1-seeds all that remain in women's tournament
content: the women's college basketball tournament will be with -160 odds . it will be its longest since the calendar flipped to 2026 . in January, Geno Auriemma's squad was -190 to win the title . UCLA has fallen to the bottom of the odds board at +600 .

title: MMA divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: How a surprise call led to 'dream' St. Brown homecoming in Germany
content: amon-Ra St. Brown received a text from a team communications staffer trying to orchestrate a facetime call with his mother . his mother, Miriam, broke the news to her youngest son that the Lions would be playing a 2026 regular-season game in her home country . the full schedule of the game will be revealed later this spring .

title: Early Men's Final Four preview: Arizona-Michigan, UConn-Illinois predictions
content: the 2026 men's final four is set for saturday's national semifinals against Illinois . the final weekend of the tournament will be a final weekend for the team . Arizona ranked fifth in the country in paint points, averaging more than 42 .

title: Meet the World Cup debutants: Cape Verde, Curaçao, Jordan, Uzbekistan tell their stories
content: the expansion of soccer's showpiece event to 48 teams has left the door ajar to nations who previously would have fallen short . the record for world cup debutants (aside from the first tournament in 1930) is six . angola , Ivory Coast , Ghana , Togo , Trinidad and tobago and Ukraine all made their bows at the 2006 competition .

title: 2026 World Cup European playoffs recap: Bosnia deny Italy for third straight World Cup
content: Gab Marcotti reacts to Italy failing to qualify for a third straight World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina on penalties. (1:37) The final spots for the 2026  FIFA World Cup  will be decided Tuesday. In Europe, four matches determined which teams will be coming to this summer's tournament in North America. Sweden  defeated  Poland  and  Türkiye  defeated  Kosovo  to book their spots in the 90 minutes as the two winning teams returned to the World Cup for the first time since 2018 and 2002, respectively. However, two games went to penalties, and in the end, it was  Czechia  that eliminated  Denmark  to return to the World Cup for the first time since 2006, and finally we had  Bosnia and Herzegovina  defeat  Italy  as the  Azzurri  failed to qualify for the World Cup a third straight time. Enjoy all that happened from Tuesday's matches!

title: Post-Elbers, IndiGo picks ex-BA chief William Walsh as CEO
content: DG of international air transport association (IATA) and former British Airways chief William Walsh were named as its new CEO . he was brought to IndiGo about four years ago to expand its international footprint . the foreign footprint expanded substantially following the Dec schedule collapse .

title: IT rules may cover social media news
content: the ministry of electronics and information technology has invited stakeholder comments till April 14 . a key proposal seeks to make it clear that Part III of the Rules — applicable to digital news publishers — will also apply to 'news and current affairs content' shared on social media .

title: If England are going to win the World Cup, it's because of Harry Kane
content: a credible debate over whether England can win the 2026 world cup with Harry Kane . the 32-year-old's fitness record is generally excellent, but it is the sort of situation that could arise in what England will be hopeful is a seven-game run at this summer's tournament .

title: Player ratings: Pulisic 3/10 in USMNT's disappointing loss to Portugal
content: Mauricio Pochettino addresses rumours about managing real madrid or Tottenham as the USMNT prepare for the world cup . the united states lost 2-0 to portugal in a friendly at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium on tuesday .

title: Week 8 Top 25 and how to watch
content: a big shakeup in this week's top ten . Nebraska, Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Tennessee and UCLA all shuffling places . the Crimson Tide received a first-place vote in advance of their series against the team that received the most votes, Texas .

title: What's next for Duke, Tennessee after Elite Eight: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament has featured its fair share of heartbreaking losses . but what's next for teams that didn't make it past the second weekend? what about for storied programs that did not reach the regionals?
